adjudication_raw:
Review: Cardiomyopathy variant pathogenicity classification.

Verdict: critique_wins

Three issues compromise the AUROC gap: (1) panel-specific calibration vs. generic PolyPhen-2 threshold — asymmetric calibration (AUROC is threshold-free but deployment framing is affected); (2) 40% evaluation from two sarcomere hotspot genes — benchmark dominated by highest-confidence variants; gene-level stratification absent; (3) PolyPhen-2 only baseline for a 'modern foundation-model representations outperform classical predictors' claim — modern alternatives (AlphaMissense, ESM-1v, EVE) are not included. The paper's clinical tool replacement recommendation is unsupported.
